OVERVIEW
As a part of our offering at 10X we offer students advanced mentoring services. The
programs include live in-person events, advanced support, exclusive training and live
online classes with Grant and various members of the 10X leadership team.
It should also be noted that while the application process and phone interviews
remain consistent, we do have several different landing pages that send the user
down the same path. 2 examples (version A and B) provided below.
The application process is by invite-only and involves the candidate completing an
application before an interview appointment is set. Enrollment is a 2 call process
and in between calls the applicant is given homework consisting of watching
Grant’s training videos.

-- 1 of 6 --

GENERAL NOTE
Application collects basic information, motivations and challenges from the candidate.
The video is very high level and makes the candidate want to apply, but intentionally
does not cover many details on the program.
TECHNOLOGY NOTE
This information is stored in Hubspot (you can use any CRM or email marketer) and
after submission the applicant goes to the next page to book an appointment. If the
candidate does not schedule an appointment in step 2 they are followed up with by a
business advisor.
ADVANCED NOTE
As you’ll see, the application gets longer as information is added to fields. This is
done to make the form less intimidating when the user lands on the page.
VIDEO APPLICATION PAGE
10xmentorprogram.com/application
1A

-- 3 of 6 --

This page has a video where Grant dives in a little deeper into the program, but does not
sell it. Below the video is a calendar widget to book an interview appointment with a
team member.
We use Hubspot for our booking appointments on our teams calendar, but you can
use any service. A common one that we recommend is Calendly.
GENERAL NOTE

-- 4 of 6 --

At the end of the initial interview phone call the business advisor sends the candidate
to this page. Their homework is to watch the 3 videos before their enrollment call,
which is the final step in the process.
We used Clickfunnels to build the page. Each of the videos are opened in a popup
primarily for aesthetic purposes.
